description: ContractorApplication type and ApplicationStatus are defined in shared types
steps: Verify ContractorApplication interface exists with all required fields: id, buildingId, companyId, contractorUserId, contractorName, contractorCompanyName, contractorSpecialty, contractorLogoUrl, message, specialty, proposedRate, currency, status, companyNotes, reviewedAt, createdAt, updatedAt

description: Badge component has accepted and withdrawn variants
steps: Verify variant map includes 'accepted' with green styling
Verify variant map includes 'withdrawn' with gray styling
